title: muhlenbergia scabra
intro: Muhlenbergia scabra, also known as the rough muhly or hairy muhly, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia scabra include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Muhlenbergia scabra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
